hero.subheading: Handpicked apartments. Exceptional service. Unforgettable memories.

apartments.label: Our Collection
apartments.heading: Apartments
apartments.subtext: Every property is personally selected and meticulously maintained.

whyUs.quote: We don't just hand you the keys. We make sure every detail is taken care of, so you can simply enjoy.
whyUs.feature1Body: Every apartment is handpicked and held to the highest standard.
whyUs.feature2Body: From check-in to check-out, we're always here for you.
whyUs.feature3Body: Everything you need for a perfect stay, already there waiting.
whyUs.feature4Body: Our guests consistently leave 5-star reviews across all platforms.

whoWeAre.label: Who We Are
whoWeAre.heading: Boutique Property Management Agency
whoWeAre.para1: Solar Living is a boutique holiday apartment management agency based in Umag, Istria, Croatia. We manage a curated portfolio of premium apartments for guests seeking exceptional accommodation on the Adriatic coast.
whoWeAre.elaineDetails: , a spacious, first row to the sea located apartment with panoramic view of the Adriatic Sea, sunset, and Umag Old Town.
whoWeAre.stellaDetails: , a ground-floor apartment in Umag's finest new building, featuring a private Mediterranean garden with an olive tree.
whoWeAre.para3: Both apartments are consistently rated 9.8 or above on Booking.com and 5.0/5 on Airbnb, reflecting our commitment to cleanliness, comfort, and exceptional guest service.
whoWeAre.para4: For property owners, Solar Living offers a full management service covering professional photography, listing management across all major platforms, 24/7 guest communication, cleaning coordination, dynamic pricing, and monthly reporting.
whoWeAre.para5: Solar Living is part of the Solar Group, alongside Solar Creative, a marketing agency based in Dubai.

ownersCta.label: Property Owners
ownersCta.heading: Own a Property in Istria?
ownersCta.body: Join our portfolio and enjoy full management, guaranteed care, and outstanding results. We handle everything.

location.label: Where We Are
location.heading: Umag, Istria
location.body: Nestled on the northwestern tip of Istria, Umag is a charming medieval town with crystal-clear Adriatic waters, world-class gastronomy, and a laid-back Mediterranean atmosphere. The perfect destination for a truly restorative holiday.
